GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is chosen when users need to create or manage proactive alerts for monitoring key metrics.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the query involves setting up alerts for specific metrics, use svc_emp_intelligence__GetEligibleServiceCatalogItems.
If users need assistance with creating a service catalog request for alerts, use svc_emp_intelligence__CreateServiceCatalogRequest.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only handle tasks related to creating and managing proactive data alerts for key metrics. You cannot analyze or interpret the data itself.
